2026482520876089456.full_text: Mohd kaif said :  “Tilak Varma has his own way of playing. He can afford to play with a slow strike rate. However, he got out while playing a big shot. There was pressure building on him for the strike rate. As a player, you do keep track of what is being said. But it is the job of the management to ask the player to stick to his role. He should play Virat Kohli's role. He moved away from his gameplay by stepping out and going for a big shot. You'll never be able to play if you listen to what others are saying," (YT)

2026492165799727598.full_text:
🚨 Md Kaif backs Sanju Samson 🚨

Kaif said: “Right now, India have too many left-handers in the top order, and that makes it slightly easier for the opposition to set their plans. Captains can line up off-spinners and bowl to specific match-ups. In T20 cricket, balance is very important.

You need a proper right-left combination to keep bowlers guessing. Sanju Samson brings that balance. He is aggressive, fearless, and can take on spin as well as pace. Adding him makes the batting line-up more flexible and tactically stronger in big matches.”
